name: Tamale Pie
recipeIngredient: 3 1/2 oz (1/2 of a 7oz can) Green Chilies
recipeInstructions:
--------------------------TOPPING--------------------------
1 c Grated Mild Cheese
1/2 c Cornmeal
1/2 c Unbleached Flour
1 ts Baking powder
1 x Dash Salt
2 tb Oil
1 ts Sugar (Optional)
1/2 c Milk
1 x Other Half Green Chilies
1. Brown the meat in a skillet.
2. Add the remaining ingredients and simmer for 20 minutes.
3. Pour the mixture into a 4-quart casserole dish.
4. Top with cheese.
5. Mix the remaining ingredients together.
6. Pour over the top of the meat and cheese.
7. Bake at 375 degrees F for 30 minutes, or until the topping is done.
